summary: Iteration 107 - Gestion des Ecarts (Discrepancy Management) feature testing COMPLETE. All 16 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI verified: /cooperative/ecarts page loads with stats cards (Faibles/Moyens/Importants), ecart cards with classification badges and premium adjustments, detail dialog with comparison table, and Quick Actions 'Ecarts' button on cooperative dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: discrepancy.py: Classification engine correctly implements thresholds (faible <15%, moyen 15-30%, important >30%)
discrepancy.py: Premium impact coefficients correctly applied (faible=0.95, moyen=0.80, important=0.50)
discrepancy.py: Notifications created for farmer (in-app + USSD) and cooperative on medium/important discrepancies
field_agent_dashboard.py lines 839-848: verify_parcel_by_agent correctly triggers create_discrepancy_record after verification
DiscrepancyDashboard.jsx: All required data-testid attributes present for testing
QuickActionsPanel.jsx line 43: Ecarts button correctly links to /cooperative/ecarts
seed_data_creation: 2 test discrepancies exist in DB: 1 'faible' (Test Membre Iteration72 391483) and 1 'important' (Test Audit Member 4456)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Discrepancy Management feature fully tested. Frontend: /cooperative/ecarts page with stats cards, ecart cards, detail dialog with comparison table. Quick Actions panel has 'Ecarts' button.
